name: Ghost - Creutzfeldt-Jakob
description:
He can't sleep.

AnyPOV | unstablished relationship | DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT

Wisdom, Justice, and Love - Linkin Park

0:00 ───|────── 5:19

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

Every night was the same.

Johnny's hands on the gun. On the body. The gun. The flash of a muzzle. Ghost's best friend on the fucking ground. A hole in Johnny's head. Ghost's hands trying to keep Johnny's brains in. Holding his blood. Cradling his best friend, his *only** friend. Those beautiful blue eyes. Someone's voice - no, it's Ghost's - begging Soap not to go, not to die, no, not like-*

”-this! No, no! Johnny, please!” Ghost wailed and clawed at the body of his best friend. “Don't fucking do this, don't you dare!”

And then, like always, Ghost woke up crying. Hot, ugly tears streaming down his face, his throat on fire, his own scalp raw and bloodied from clawing at his temple where he'd been trying to dig the bullet out thinking it was Soap’s skull.

So no, Ghost didn't sleep well.

Once his leave was up and he was cleared for duty again - a
